name: Swapi.Query

values.name: droid
values.comment: - id - ID of the droid.
values.type: { id : Id } -> SelectionSet decodesTo Droid -> Field (Maybe decodesTo) RootQuery

values.name: greet
values.comment: - input - input arguments

values.name: hero
values.comment: - episode - If omitted, returns the hero of the whole saga. If provided, returns the hero of that particular episode.
values.type: ({ episode : OptionalArgument Episode } -> { episode : OptionalArgument Episode }) -> SelectionSet decodesTo Character -> Field decodesTo RootQuery

values.name: heroUnion
values.comment: - episode - If omitted, returns the hero of the whole saga. If provided, returns the hero of that particular episode.
values.type: ({ episode : OptionalArgument Episode } -> { episode : OptionalArgument Episode }) -> SelectionSet decodesTo CharacterUnion -> Field (Maybe decodesTo) RootQuery

values.name: human
values.comment: - id - ID of the human.
values.type: { id : Id } -> SelectionSet decodesTo Human -> Field (Maybe decodesTo) RootQuery

values.name: selection
values.comment:
Select fields to build up a top-level query. The request can be sent with
functions from `Graphqelm.Http`.

aliases.name: Greeting
aliases.comment: Type for the Greeting input object.
aliases.type: { language : OptionalArgument Language, name : String, options : OptionalArgument GreetingOptions }

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a Greeting into a value that can be used as an argument.

values.name: newMessage
values.comment: Listen for new messages that are published.
values.type: SelectionSet decodesTo ChatMessage -> Field decodesTo RootSubscription

values.name: selection
values.comment:
Select fields to build up a top-level mutation. The request can be sent with
functions from `Graphqelm.Http`.

name: Swapi.Union.CharacterUnion
comment:
Code for retrieving fields from a CharacterUnion in a type-safe way.
@docs selection, onHuman, onDroid

values.name: onDroid
values.comment: Select fields to use when the type is Droid.
values.type: SelectionSet decodesTo Droid -> FragmentSelectionSet decodesTo CharacterUnion

values.name: onHuman
values.comment: Select the fields to use when the type is Human.
values.type: SelectionSet decodesTo Human -> FragmentSelectionSet decodesTo CharacterUnion

values.name: selection
values.comment: Specify fields to use for the object.
values.type: (Maybe typeSpecific -> constructor) -> List (FragmentSelectionSet typeSpecific CharacterUnion) -> SelectionSet constructor CharacterUnion

name: Swapi.Object.Droid
comment:
Code for retrieving fields from a Character in a type-safe way.
@docs selection, appearsIn, friends, id, name, primaryFunction, avatarUrl

values.name: appearsIn
values.comment: Which movies they appear in.

values.name: avatarUrl
values.comment: Url to a profile picture for the character.

values.name: friends
values.comment: The friends of the droid, or an empty list if they have none.
values.type: SelectionSet decodesTo Character -> Field (List decodesTo) Droid

values.name: id
values.comment: The ID of the droid.

values.name: name
values.comment: The name of the droid.

values.name: primaryFunction
values.comment: The primary function of the droid.

values.name: selection
values.comment: Select fields to build up a SelectionSet for this object.

aliases.name: GreetingOptions
aliases.comment: Type for the GreetingOptions input object.

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a GreetingOptions into a value that can be used as an argument.

name: Swapi.Object.Human
comment:
Code for retrieving fields from a Human in a type-safe way.
@docs selection, appearsIn, friends, id, name, homePlanet, avatarUrl

values.name: appearsIn
values.comment: Which movies they appear in.

values.name: avatarUrl
values.comment: Url to a profile picture for the character.

values.name: friends
values.comment: The friends of the human, or an empty list if they have none.
values.type: SelectionSet decodesTo Character -> Field (List decodesTo) Human

values.name: homePlanet
values.comment: The home planet of the human, or null if unknown.

values.name: id
values.comment: The ID of the human.

values.name: name
values.comment: The name of the human.

values.name: selection
values.comment: Select fields to build up a SelectionSet for this object.

name: Swapi.Interface.Character
comment:
Code for retrieving fields from a Character in a type-safe way.
@docs selection, commonSelection, onDroid, onHuman, appearsIn, friends, id, name, avatarUrl

values.name: appearsIn
values.comment: Which movies they appear in.

values.name: avatarUrl
values.comment: Url to a profile picture for the character.

values.name: commonSelection
values.comment: Select only common fields from the interface.

values.name: friends
values.comment: The friends of the character, or an empty list if they have none.
values.type: SelectionSet decodesTo Character -> Field (List decodesTo) Character

values.name: id
values.comment: The ID of the character.

values.name: name
values.comment: The name of the character.

values.name: onDroid
values.comment: Select the fields to use when the type is Droid.
values.type: SelectionSet decodesTo Droid -> FragmentSelectionSet decodesTo Character

values.name: onHuman
values.comment: Select the fields to use when the type is Human.
values.type: SelectionSet decodesTo Human -> FragmentSelectionSet decodesTo Character

values.name: selection
values.comment: Select both common and type-specific fields from the interface.
values.type: (Maybe typeSpecific -> a -> constructor) -> List (FragmentSelectionSet typeSpecific Character) -> SelectionSet (a -> constructor) Character

values.name: selection
values.comment:
Select fields to build up a top-level mutation. The request can be sent with
functions from `Graphqelm.Http`.

values.name: sendMessage
values.comment: send a message for the realtime subscriptions to see.
values.type: { characterId : Id, phrase : Phrase } -> SelectionSet decodesTo ChatMessage -> Field (Maybe decodesTo) RootMutation

name: Swapi.Union
Swapi.Object
Swapi.Scalar
Swapi.Interface
Swapi.Enum.Phrase
comment:
Phrases for chat subscriptions demo.
@docs Phrase, decoder, toString

unions.name: Phrase
unions.comment:
Phrases for StarChat

  - BadFeeling - Originally said by Han Solo
  - Droids - Originally said by Obi-Wan
  - Faith - Originally said by Vader.
  - Father - Originally said by Vader.
  - Help - Originally said by Leia.
  - TheForce - Originally said by Obi-Wan.
  - Traitor - Originally said by Vader
  - Trap - Originally said by Admiral Ackbar
  - Try - Originally said by Yoda.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: decoder

values.name: toString
values.comment: Convert from the union type representating the Enum to a string that the GraphQL server will recognize.

name: Swapi.Enum.Language
comment:
Enum for languages for greetings.
@docs Language, decoder, toString

unions.name: Language
unions.comment:
- En - English
  - Es - Spanish
  - No - Norwegian

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decode a string from the GraphQL server into the Language union.

values.name: toString
values.comment: Convert from the union type representating the Enum to a string that the GraphQL server will recognize.

name: Swapi.Enum.Episode
comment:
Enum for all episodes that the API has in its system.
@docs Episode, decoder, toString

unions.name: Episode
unions.comment:
One of the films in the Star Wars Trilogy

  - Empire - Released in 1980.
  - Jedi - Released in 1983.
  - Newhope - Released in 1977.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decode an Episode from the GraphQL endpoint.

values.name: toString
values.comment: Convert from the union type representating the Enum to a string that the GraphQL server will recognize.
